tasks.objective: Implement functionality to list network interfaces and display routing table information.
tasks.title: Implement Interface and Route Discovery

tasks.objective: Implement functionality to retrieve and display public and current IP addresses.
tasks.title: Implement IP Address Retrieval

tasks.objective: Implement functionality to gather and display DNS resolution information.
tasks.title: Implement DNS Information Gathering

tasks.objective: Implement the `-a` flag to display all network information in a single command.
tasks.title: Implement Comprehensive Information Display

tasks.objective: Implement robust error handling and display help information for unrecognized commands.
tasks.title: Error Handling and Help Information
